name: Lunar Mountain
short_description: Players control a brave adventurer as they journey through a series of beautifully crafted 2D platforming levels. Set on a mysterious and ancient lunar mountain, players must use their skills and wits to overcome a variety of challenges that stand in their way.
detailed_description:
WORKS BEST WITH PlayStation DUALSENSE CONTROLLER

Lunar Mountain is a 2D platformer game set on the moon. Players take on the role of an astronaut on a mission to reach the summit of a mysterious mountain that has appeared on the lunar surface. Along the way, players must navigate through treacherous terrain, With stunning lunar landscapes and challenging gameplay, Lunar Mountain offers a unique and thrilling gaming experience for players of all ages.
